name: etechflow/module-blog
description: Etechflow Blog — a fast, SEO-friendly, fully responsive, theme-agnostic blog for Magento 2 / Adobe Commerce. Compatible with Hyvä, Luma and Adobe Commerce themes.

suggest.magento/module-csp: Adds Content-Security-Policy whitelisting support used by the blog assets.
suggest.hyva-themes/magento2-default-theme: For Hyvä storefronts (the blog is Hyvä-ready out of the box, no bridge needed).
